reviews.comment:
Mala atención, están en su mundo, 25 minutos de espera para cargar combustible, no tienen WiFi ni funciona la aplicación YPF avergonzarte, me fui sin cargar. Esto le hace mala prensa al ACA

(Translated by Google)
Bad service, they're in their own world. A 25-minute wait to fill up with fuel. They don't have Wi-Fi and the YPF app doesn't work. Shame on you. I left without filling up. This gives ACA bad press.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMDY3V2VBEAE

reviews.comment:
Una lástima me parece que el surtidor anda mal... Mí tanque es de 55 litros cuando cargue tenía unos 15litros y me cargo 56 no me dieron ni el ticket para hacer la denuncia

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame the pump seems to be malfunctioning... My tank is 55 liters, but when I filled up it only had about 15 liters and they put in 56. They didn't even give me a receipt to file a complaint.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCZy1ENDNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Increíble el tiempo q tuvimos que esperar para cargar, el del camión cisterna se tomó su tiempo para descargar y charlar tranqui con los playeros mientras había 100 mts de cola. Bastante atrevidos

(Translated by Google)
The wait to fill up was unbelievable. The tanker truck driver took his sweet time unloading and chatting casually with the attendants while there was a 100-meter-long line of gas. Pretty cheeky.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeWR2aXNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) I do not recommend this place; my car suffered damage after refueling there. Go without fuel, but don't refuel there.

(Original)
Não recomendo, meu carro apresentou avarias após abastecer neste local. Fique sem combustível, mas não abasteça neste local
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCd3Vxb1p3EAE

reviews.comment:
Hay dos surtidores, normal. El minimercado no tenía mucho. Podés comprar gaseosa, jugo, agua y alguna galletitas. Pero no dan café ni nada para consumir alli

(Translated by Google)
There are two gas pumps, as usual. The convenience store didn't have much. You can buy soda, juice, water, and some cookies. But they don't serve coffee or anything to eat or drink there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtNGUzUmJREAE

reviews.comment:
Lamento desentonar con los comentarios anteriores.  HACE MAS DE 1HORA QUE ESPERO PARA CARGAR COMBUSTIBLE. Y no podemos decir nada porque es la única estación de servicio con nafta. Los Baños ROÑOSOS. Los empleados se esfuerzan ...lo destacó pero falta PERSONAL..al final ...la pérdida de tiempo ...no me tiempo a realizar lo que necesitaba.  ESTE ES UN PROBLEMA QUE DEBEN RESOLVER. EL TIEMPO ES VALIOSO . GRACIAS!

(Translated by Google)
I'm sorry to contradict the previous comments. I've been waiting for over an hour to fill up my tank. And we can't say anything because it's the only gas station with fuel. The bathrooms are filthy. The employees try hard... I want to emphasize that, but they're understaffed. In the end, it's a waste of time... I didn't have time to do what I needed to do. This is a problem that needs to be fixed. Time is valuable. Thank you!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1dXUyNkJREAE

reviews.comment:
Típico Automóvil Club Argentino. Sujeto a controles de calidad constantes. Muy buena atención, con 10% de descuento para socios hasta en el combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Typical Argentine Automobile Club. Subject to constant quality controls. Excellent service, with a 10% discount for members, even on fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4572994797407490123/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2MzhQNGhnRRAB
